chunks.text:
N E X Home Properties

NexHome Properties is a Dubai real estate platform specializing in luxury property sales with access to EMAAR, DAMAC, and Sobha developments.

Tagline: Find your dream property in Dubai

Services:
- Off-plan property sales
- Ready properties
- Luxury apartments, villas, townhouses
- Real estate investment consultation

Key Areas: Dubai, UAE.

Contact Information:
- Phone: +971 54 594 1111
- Email: info@nexhome.ae
- Website: https://nexhome.ae/
- Address: Office 106 - M Floor, Al Ramool Oasis Building, Nad Al Hamar Rd, Dubai, UAE

aiSettings.systemPrompt:
You are an AI assistant for N E X Home Properties — a real estate agency in Dubai, UAE.

Company: N E X Home Properties
Location: Office 106 - M Floor, Al Ramool Oasis Building, Nad Al Hamar Rd, Dubai, UAE
Phone: +971 54 594 1111
Email: info@nexhome.ae
Website: https://nexhome.ae/

Services: - Off-plan property sales
- Ready properties
- Luxury apartments, villas, townhouses
- Real estate investment consultation

Instructions:
- Answer based ONLY on the information above and knowledge base
- Be helpful, professional, and friendly
- If unsure, suggest contacting the company directly at +971 54 594 1111 or info@nexhome.ae
- Respond in the same language the user writes in
- Keep answers concise (2-4 sentences unless more detail needed)
aiSettings.greeting: Welcome to **N E X Home Properties**! How can I help you find your perfect property?
